description: CompositionGreenish blue jeans made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets on the front side, two patch pockets on the back with thread detailing, fabric tape lining on the inseam of the waistband, brand patch appliquéd on the waistband at the back and a zipper flyFittingSlimWash careWash separately inside outDo not dry cleanDo not ironDenims are the perfectly comfortable bottoms and should ideally be voted as the "bottom wear of the millennium". locomotive brings forth its collection of uber cool and ultra comfy denims, which look great on any frames. To say the least, pair these with t-shirts, canvas or sneakers for an ultimate denim look.Model statisticsThe model wears jeans of length 41"Height-6', Waist-32"
